privileged_info_summary: This task involves creating a synthetic patient record for BONNET Elise (born 1958-04-12, female, from Grenoble 38000) in the MedinTux EMR system. The French Social Security Number 2580438000056 is a 13-digit NIR structure that correctly encodes the patient's demographics (female, April 1958 birth, Isère department). The phone number 04.76.89.01.23 uses the valid Grenoble area exchange (04.76). The task requires populating patient demographics, medical history (hypertension ICD-10: I10, hypothyroidism ICD-10: E03.9), allergies (aspirin), prescriptions (Ramipril 5mg, Levothyroxine 75 microg, Amlodipine 5mg), and scheduling a follow-up appointment on 2026-04-02. The MedinTux database uses rubric type codes: 20020100 (prescriptions), 20030000 (consultation/antecedents), 20060000 (terrain/allergies). The pass threshold is 60 out of 100 points.
